channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Hayden AI Sues Former CEO Over Alleged Data Theft and Resume Fraud
item.description: Hayden AI, a San Francisco-based startup specializing in spatial analytics for urban planning, has filed a lawsuit against its former co-founder and CEO, Chris Carson. The company alleges that in the ...

item.title: Foreign intelligence agencies urged to cooperate with Bondi Royal Commission
item.description: A leading Australian intelligence expert, Chris Taylor from the Australian Strategic Policy Institute, has suggested that foreign officials from the Five Eyes alliance — comprising the US, UK, Canada,...

item.title: ICC Appeals Chamber Rejects Duterte's Latest Bid for Temporary Release Due to Health Concerns
item.description: The International Criminal Court (ICC) Appeals Chamber has unanimously rejected a new appeal from former President Rodrigo Duterte's defence team seeking his temporary release from detention in The Ha...

item.title: Kenya Meteorological Department Issues Heavy Rain Warning for Several Counties
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department (KMD) has issued an advisory warning of heavy rainfall over the next 24 hours affecting multiple counties in Kenya. Nairobi County is expected to experience widespr...

item.title: National Democrats Hesitate on Major Spending for Texas Senate Race
item.description: National Democrats are grappling with whether to invest heavily in Texas to support James Talarico's U.S. Senate campaign amid recent primary successes. Talarico, a state representative who won the De...

item.title: Montreal teacher disputes school policy on student gender identity disclosure
item.description: A Montreal high school teacher has launched a constitutional challenge against a provincial policy that allows students aged 14 and older to change their name and pronouns at school without parental c...

item.title: Research Highlights Underdiagnosis of Sleep Apnea in Women and the Need for Targeted Detection
item.description: Sleep apnea, once thought to primarily affect older, heavier men, is increasingly recognized as a significant and often undetected condition in women, especially during perimenopause and menopause. Ob...

item.title: UPSC CSE 2025 Results Released: List of Qualified Candidates Available Online
item.description: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has officially declared the results of the Civil Services Examination (CSE) 2025. Candidates who appeared for this prestigious exam can now verify whether th...

item.title: Tanzanian Parents Urge Government to Establish Fund for Premature Baby Care
item.description: In Tanzania, many families with premature babies face overwhelming financial pressures due to high costs of neonatal care. Parents across the country are now appealing for the government to set up a d...

item.title: PM Shehbaz directs strict monitoring and action against petrol hoarding
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif on Friday instructed relevant authorities to closely monitor the transportation and supply of petroleum products throughout Pakistan. During a high-level meeting in Islam...

item.title: Bible Society of Nigeria Urges Ogba People to Fast-Track Bible Translation into Their Language
item.description: The Bible Society of Nigeria (BSN) Rivers/Bayelsa Area don call on the Ogba people for Ogba Egbema/Ndoni Local Government Area for make haste finish the translation of the Bible into Ogba language. Ch...

item.title: RBI Releases Draft Guidelines for Digital Fraud Compensation with 85% Coverage
item.description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has put forward draft guidelines aimed at compensating victims of digital frauds, covering about 85% of affected cases. These guidelines are intended to strengthen cons...

item.title: Federal Gun Buyback Program Faces High Costs and Police Criticism
item.description: The federal government's Assault-Style Firearms Compensation Program (ASFCP), designed to buy back prohibited firearms, has incurred costs exceeding $779 million, equating to roughly $24,370 per gun c...

item.title: Al-Hikma Foundation Sets Requirements for Dowry Payment Program
item.description: Dar es Salaam – Sheikh Nurdin Kishki, director of the Al-Hikma Foundation, has laid out ten conditions for women who want their dowries paid under a new program announced on March 1, 2026. The program...

item.title: Six People Missing After Vehicle Swept Off uMsinga Bridge During Heavy Rains
item.description: Search and rescue operations are underway in uMsinga, northern KwaZulu-Natal, after a vehicle carrying eight people was swept off the low-lying Infenebude Bridge on Thursday evening due to heavy rainf...

item.title: Axel Springer announces agreement to acquire Telegraph Media Group, pending regulatory approval
item.description: German media company Axel Springer has reached an agreement to purchase the Telegraph Media Group for £575 million, subject to regulatory approval. The acquisition would bring both the Daily and Sunda...

item.title: Three Women Questioned for Alleged Involvement in Mohamed Al Fayed Sexual Offences
item.description: The Metropolitan Police have interviewed three women, aged in their 40s, 50s, and 60s, under caution on suspicion of aiding and abetting sexual offences allegedly committed by former Harrods owner Moh...

item.title: Explosion Near Checkpost on Bannu-Miranshah Road Kills One, Injures 19 in North Waziristan
item.description: On Friday, a powerful blast occurred near the Chashma Sarbandki checkpost along the Bannu-Miranshah main road in North Waziristan district of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa. According to police and hospital offic...

item.title: Top Adviser to NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani Advises British Progressive Politicians on Campaign Strategies
item.description: Morris Katz, a 26-year-old key strategist behind New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's successful 2025 mayoral campaign, traveled to the United Kingdom in February 2026 to meet with progressive politic...

item.title: Quezon City inaugurates new laboratory to ensure safe drinking water
item.description: The Quezon City government has inaugurated its own water testing laboratory aimed at ensuring the safety and quality of water supplied to households throughout the city. Mayor Joy Belmonte emphasized ...
